tagline: Chronological activity stream — avatar + rich sentence + relative time.
whenToUse: Reach for Activity Feed when you need a full, scrollable audit stream — who did what to which object, newest first, with optional sticky day headers and a real load-more button. It is the primitive Recent Activity wraps in a card: use Activity Feed on a dedicated "Activity" page or a tall panel; use Recent Activity for a compact dashboard widget of the latest few items. Prefer Timeline instead when you are showing an ordered process with fixed stages rather than a live event log.
